description_long: This is a large, round-bodied terracotta vase with a wide, slightly flared mouth and a short neck. The surface is matte and textured, showing subtle horizontal striations and natural color variations from light tan to reddish-brown, with some darker patches near the base. The vase appears hand-crafted, with an uneven rim and a slightly asymmetrical form, giving it a rustic, artisanal character. There are no visible handles or decorative embellishments, and the body is plain except for the natural textural marks. The interior is dark, suggesting it is hollow and capable of holding contents such as water or plants. The overall appearance suggests it is a traditional clay vessel, suitable for outdoor or garden use in an urban environment.
description: A large, round, rustic terracotta vase with a wide flared mouth and textured, matte surface in earthy tones. The form is plain and hand-crafted, with natural color variations and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from a side angle, highlighting its round body, flared mouth, and subtle surface texture with darker patches near the base.
description_view_1: This view shows the mouth more directly, revealing its uneven rim and the pronounced curvature of the body, with lighter coloration on the upper half.
description_view_2: The vase is viewed from a slightly higher angle, emphasizing the wide opening and the smooth, continuous curve of the body with minimal surface markings.
description_view_3: This angle displays the opposite side, showing more of the reddish-brown hues and some lighter, worn areas near the base.
